sections.title: Generations
sections.odds: 60 cards. 1:4 packs. · PARALLEL CARDS: Red #/799 or less, Blue #/299, Green #/75, Pink #/25. · RED PARALLELS: Red Veterans #/799, Red Legends #/699, Red Rookies/Young Stars #/599.

sections.title: Rookie Renditions
sections.odds: 40 cards. 1:5 packs. · PARALLEL CARDS: Red #/799, Blue #/399, Green #/75, Pink #/25.
